arri_skin_d55.name: arri_skin_d55
arri_skin_d55.label: ARRI skin prefeed (D55)
arri_skin_d55.note: Demo spectral fit from rough ALEV3/IMX410 curves and a sigmoid Sigma fp hot-mirror model; replace curves with measured CSV data for production calibration. [skin window refit from real DNG samples 2026-07-06] [skin window refit from real DNG samples 2026-07-06]

sources.alev3_ssf: CIC 23 paper, modelled ARRI ALEXA SSF; rough built-in values are placeholders.
sources.imx410_qe: ZWO ASI2400MC / Sony IMX410 RGB QE curve; rough built-in values are placeholders.
sources.sigma_fp_hot_mirror: sigmoid transmission with red cutoff 660nm, width 15nm.
sources.skin_spectra: Built-in analytic demo skin manifold unless --skin-csv is provided.
